title: Moderation Update – High-Severity Reports Reviewed
body:
We've reviewed and actioned 3 high-priority reports:

✅ spam_wave_42 – Banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels
✅ toxic_runner – Warned for repeated harassment of newcomers
✅ core_maintainer – Report dismissed as false positive (brigading)

3 additional reports (medium/low severity) remain under review.

We aim to respond to high-severity issues within hours. Thanks to everyone who flags concerns—reports make the community safer.
